_comment: RFC 7520 Section 4.3 — ECDSA Signature (ES512 from JOSE Cookbook)

request.data_plaintext: It’s a dangerous business, Frodo, going out your door. You step onto the road, and if you don't keep your feet, there's no knowing where you might be swept off to.

rfc_jwk._comment: EC P-521 key from RFC 7520 Section 3.2
